accessibility.text: Introduction to the Hugging Face Platform
Model Hub: Repository for sharing and discovering models.
Transformers Library: Access to pre-trained models.
Hugging Face offers tools and libraries for NLP, making it easier to implement and deploy models.
Pluralsight-Logo-Stacked-ColorWhite-Fill.png
pasted-movie.png
Datasets: Collection of datasets for various NLP tasks.
Gráfico 22
